steps.description: Apply a minimal bugfix to the shipyard ripgrep-backed search tool. The function grepSearch currently resolves a 'success: true' result when exec returns an error and there is no stdout; that should be a failure (success: false). Modify only this one file to return success: false in the error/no-stdout branch. This is a single-line, minimal change in one untouched file.
Run a focused TypeScript check for the shipyard package to verify the change doesn't break typechecking. Use the shipyard package's type-check script.
Run the shipyard unit tests (vitest) as a focused runtime check to ensure the small fix doesn't break tests in the shipyard package.

messages.content: In ship-refactored, make a minimal bugfix in one untouched file and run only focused checks.
